ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of tearing off a page from a calendar.  The robot will use both arms to mimic this action.  The movement will be deliberate and somewhat forceful to emphasize the tearing motion.  We'll use a combination of arm rotations and pitches to create the illusion of gripping and pulling.  I will refer to the existing examples to ensure the movements are within the robot's capabilities and appear natural. Frame 1 will show the robot's arms positioned to grasp the calendar page. Frame 2 will show the arms pulling apart, simulating the tear. Frame 3 will show the arms separating with the page removed. Frame 4 will show the arms returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms reach out to grip the calendar page
arms pull apart, tearing the page with force
page is ripped free, arms swing wide
arms return to rest, the deed is done
